mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_record(order_id, payment_no, channel, status, amount) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{paymentNo}, 'ALIPAY_SANDBOX', 'CREATED', #{amount})
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_record SET status = 'PAID', gateway_trade_no = #{gatewayTradeNo}, notify_payload = #{payload}, verified = 1, paid_at = COALESCE(paid_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM payment_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAID'
SELECT id, order_id, payment_no, channel, status, amount, gateway_trade_no, verified FROM payment_record WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo} LIMIT 1
